name: NexAI Protocol
summary: NexAI Protocol is a decentralized AI inference marketplace built on Arbitrum L2. It enables GPU providers to monetize idle compute by serving AI model inference requests. The protocol uses a proof-of-inference mechanism to verify computation integrity. Early traction includes partnerships with two mid-tier AI startups, though mainnet launched only 3 weeks before listing. Token utility centers on staking for inference priority and fee discounts.

factors: Low initial circulating ratio (12%) creates supply overhang risk
Mainnet live only 3 weeks before listing — limited battle-testing
No tier-1 audit completed (self-reported internal audit only)
AI narrative sector is crowded with 40+ competing tokens in 2026
